task: place the black bowl in the oven
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A black bowl is on a wooden table. A blue oven with a door is on the right. The bowl is rigid with a curved rim; the oven door has a handle. STRATEGY - reach the bowl at its rim for stable grasp, lift and transport to the oven, open the oven door, place the bowl inside, then close the door. Failure modes: dropping the bowl, misaligning it with the oven opening, or failing to close the door. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach bowl rim; Step 2 grasp rim for secure hold; Step 3 transport to oven; Step 4 grasp oven door handle; Step 5 open door; Step 6 place bowl inside; Step 7 release bowl; Step 8 close door.

Goal: inside(black_bowl, oven); closed(oven_door)
Scene: black_bowl, oven, table
Step 1: reach(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the rim of the black bowl
  contact: holding(black_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_bowl)
Step 3: transport(black_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  spatial: above(black_bowl, oven, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_bowl)
  done_when: above(black_bowl, oven, 0.05)
Step 4: reach(oven_door)
  affordance_region: the handle of the oven door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, oven_door, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, oven_door) < 0.03
Step 5: grasp(oven_door)
  affordance_region: the handle of the oven door
  contact: holding(oven_door) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(oven_door)
Step 6: pull(oven_door -> open)
  affordance_region: the handle of the oven door
  contact: holding(oven_door) [progress]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: open(oven_door)
Step 7: place(black_bowl -> oven)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the oven
  contact: surface_contact(black_bowl, oven) [completion]; released(black_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_bowl, oven) AND released(black_bowl)
Step 8: release(oven_door)
  affordance_region: the handle of the oven door
  contact: released(oven_door) [completion]
  direction: release_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: released(oven_door)
Step 9: push(oven_door -> closed)
  affordance_region: the handle of the oven door
  contact: holding(oven_door) [progress]
  direction: push_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: closed(oven_door)
<END_OF_PLAN>
